description_long: This is a medium-sized, irregularly shaped stone with a predominantly light beige coloration and rough, angular surfaces. The stone features a combination of flat and jagged faces, with some edges appearing more sharply defined and others more weathered and rounded. Subtle layering and natural textural variations are visible across its surface, suggesting sedimentary origins. The stone's mass and density are evident from its solid, compact form, and it lacks any visible cavities or artificial modifications. Its surface finish is matte and rough, with a tactile hardness typical of natural limestone or sandstone. This stone would commonly be found as a landscape feature or urban barrier, blending naturally into outdoor environments.
description: A light beige, rough-textured stone with angular and jagged surfaces, showing natural layering and weathering. Its solid, compact form and matte finish suggest it is a durable sedimentary rock.
description_view_0: This view highlights the stone's broad, flat upper surface and a sharply angled edge on the right, with visible layering and rough texture.
description_view_1: The left side appears more rounded and weathered, with a prominent horizontal ridge running along the middle of the stone.
description_view_2: This angle shows the stone's elongated profile, with a relatively flat top and a gently sloping side, emphasizing its length.
description_view_3: Distinct, deep grooves and angular facets are visible on the right, giving this side a more rugged and chiseled appearance.
attribute_location: urban park, roadside verge, or landscaped plaza
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature or used as a natural barrier along pathways
attribute_pattern: Subtle natural layering and irregular mottling, with no artificial carvings or regular patterns; the surface is visually varied due to sedimentary formation.
attribute_weathering: Rough and slightly eroded, with some edges rounded from exposure; surface shows minor pitting and natural wear typical of outdoor stones.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Blends naturally with soil, gravel, or other stones in landscaped areas; may contrast with concrete or metal urban features but integrates well with vegetation and natural ground cover.
